title: Hālīsahar Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Hālīsahar with a Z-Score of +4.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a CRITICAL level.
body:
The current weather conditions in Hālīsahar are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an Umidita of 79% and a Vento of 13.5 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with a CDD of 13.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no energy demand for heating, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Hālīsahar.
